---
title: "How it works?"
description: "Learn how to use and share AI-generated templates on CodeRocket"
icon: "lightbulb"
---

The **CodeRocket Templates** platform allows you to discover, use, and share high-quality AI-generated templates. Simple, secure, and accessible to everyone.

## 🆓 Using Templates

<Steps>
  <Step title="Explore">
    Browse templates by category or use the search function
  </Step>
  <Step title="Preview">
    Test the template before using with the interactive demo
  </Step>
  <Step title="Use">
    Get instant access to free templates or purchase premium ones
  </Step>
  <Step title="Customize">
    Get the complete source code and customize as needed
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Note>
  **Free templates available** - No subscription required to use free templates!
</Note>

## 💰 Sharing Your Templates

<Steps>
  <Step title="Create">
    Build quality templates with CodeRocket
  </Step>
  <Step title="Share">
    List your template for free or set a price
  </Step>
  <Step title="Earn">
    **70% of each sale** directly to your account (for premium templates)
  </Step>
</Steps>

<Info>
  **Free templates**: Share your work with the community at no cost
  **Premium templates**: Require active CodeRocket Premium subscription and Stripe Connect account
</Info>

## 📋 Available Template Types

<CardGroup cols={3}>
  <Card title="Landing Pages" icon="layout-template">
    Complete landing pages
  </Card>
  <Card title="UI Components" icon="puzzle">
    Reusable interface elements
  </Card>
  <Card title="Email Templates" icon="mail">
    Professional email templates
  </Card>
</CardGroup>

## 💡 Why Use Templates?

- **Save time**: Ready-to-use templates
- **Guaranteed quality**: Created by experts
- **Source code included**: Total customization
- **GitHub support**: Direct export to your projects
- **Secure payments**: Via Stripe (for premium templates)
- **Free options**: Many templates available at no cost
